THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF JACKSON GROUP PROPERTY MANAGEMENT RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MIKHALEVSKY, JONATHAN THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 100 DANVERS STREET, #4, SAN FRANCISCO, LEASE FORFEITED, SEE SCANNED DOC

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF JACKSON GROUP PROPERTY MANAGEMENT RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MIKHALEVSKY, JONATHAN THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 100 DANVERS STREET, #4 SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94114, **INCLUDE ALL UNNAMED OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISES**
